transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Robert Klein. I'm calling because my AC unit is making a loud noise. Dispatcher: Hi Robert, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Carrier, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 88 Maple Ave. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out next Monday at 9. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.issue: AC unit is making a loud noise
expected_entities.equipment: Carrier AC unit, an older one, 15 years
